response.original_title: Disney+ Insider: The Mandalorian and Grogu- a New Mission Launches at Disneyland Resort
response.overview: Go behind the scenes at Star Wars: Galaxy’s Edge at Disneyland Resort as Disney+ Insider explores the evolving story of Batuu. Hosts Anthony Carboni and Katarina Cruz experience the land and its newest offerings, encountering iconic characters like Luke Skywalker, Leia Organa, Han Solo, and Darth Vader. Along the way, they meet the Mandalorian and Grogu, sample themed treats, and hear from director Jon Favreau about bringing these beloved characters to the big screen. From immersive character moments to updated adventures like Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run and new nighttime projections, fans can experience Batuu in exciting new ways. See “The Mandalorian and Grogu” in theaters and IMAX.
response.title: Disney+ Insider: The Mandalorian and Grogu- a New Mission Launches at Disneyland Resort
